home.subtitle: Create and manage solo or team tournaments with draft, scoring, and role bans.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.teamTooSmall: Team must have at least {required} members ({count} currently)
tournaments.teamTooSmallHint: Your teams need at least {count} members to register. Invite players from the team page.
tournaments.memberConflict: A member of your team is already registered with another team.
tournaments.memberConflictHint: None of your teams can join: a member is already in this tournament with another team.
tournaments.maxTeamsRequired: Please set the maximum number of teams.
tournaments.maxPlayersRequired: Please set the maximum number of players.
tournaments.captainDraftHint: You captain {team} — ban and pick from your link
tournaments.memberDraftHint: Your team is in this draft. The captain handles bans and picks.
tournaments.organizerDraftHint: Launch drafts for the current round. Each captain opens their draft from here or the dashboard.
tournaments.prizeCodesHint: One code per placing player (solo tournaments).
tournaments.prizeCodesHintTeam: 4 unique codes per place (1 per team member). Leave a place empty if there is no reward.
tournaments.prizePlacementHint: 1 code per team member (4 codes total).
tournaments.seriesConfigHint: BO1 for early rounds by default. Set semi-finals and final separately (e.g. BO3 or BO5).
tournaments.prizeCodesPerPlacement: Enter exactly {count} codes per place, or leave all 4 fields empty.
tournaments.prizeCodeHint: Single-use code — also saved in your notifications.
tournaments.registrationClosed: Registration is closed for this tournament (in progress or completed).
tournaments.reopenHasEntries: Cannot reopen: participants are already registered.
tournaments.reopenHasResults: Cannot reopen: matches have already been played.
tournaments.checkInHint: Each captain must confirm their team is present before the tournament can start.
tournaments.checkInNotParticipant: You are not registered for this tournament
tournaments.checkInIncomplete: All teams must check in before starting the tournament
tournaments.minParticipantsHint: At least {required} teams or players must register before starting ({current}/{required}).
tournaments.checkInInvalidStatus: Check-in is not available for this status
tournaments.tournamentFinishedHint: Tournament finished — standings and prizes available
tournaments.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this tournament? This cannot be undone.

teams.title: Teams
teams.noMyTeams: You are not on any team yet
teams.name: Team name
teams.inviteRegisterHint: Create an account or log in to join the team.
teams.inviteCreatedNoEmail: Invite created but email not sent:
teams.alreadyInTeam: This person is already on this team.
teams.inviteUserAlreadyInTeam: This player is already on team {team}.
teams.invalidTeamInput: Invalid name or tag (name min. 2 characters, tag 2–6 characters if provided).
teams.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this team?
teams.leaveDisbandConfirm: You are the only member — leaving will delete the team.
teams.captainMustTransfer: Transfer captain role to another member before leaving.

draft.title: Draft
draft.clickToBanRole: Click a character to ban from this role
draft.roleBanComplete: Ban quota reached for this role
draft.clickToPickRole: Click a character to pick in this role
draft.rolePickComplete: Pick quota reached for this role
draft.banPhaseHint: Alternating: 1 ban per team. Quotas — Tank 1, Support 1, DPS 2
draft.pickPhaseHint: Order: 1 pick → 2 picks → 2 picks → 2 picks → 1 pick. Quotas — Tank 1, Support 1, DPS 2
draft.banPhaseComplete: All bans done — pick phase started
draft.pickPhaseOrganizerHint: Captains pick via their dedicated link
draft.captainPickHint: Click a hero, then confirm (1 Tank, 1 Support, 2 DPS). Follow the draft order.
draft.spectatorLinkHint: View-only — share with stream or audience
draft.captainLinkHint: Each captain bans on their turn (1 Tank, 1 Support, 2 DPS)
draft.captainViewHint: Click a hero, then confirm your ban. One ban at a time, alternating teams.
draft.waitingForStart: Waiting for the organizer to start the draft…
draft.clickToPickConfirm: Click a hero, then confirm or cancel your pick
draft.previewHint: Preview of available heroes — start the draft to begin banning
draft.organizerOnly: Only the tournament organizer can configure the draft. Log in with the organizer account.
draft.forbidden: This action is reserved for the tournament organizer.
draft.noMatchDrafts: No matches ready for draft. Set up the bracket first.
draft.organizerSpectatorHint: Launch drafts per round, then watch each match as a spectator.
draft.spectatorOnly: Drafts are run by each match's team captains.

bracket.needParticipants: At least 2 registered teams to create matches.
bracket.waitingOrganizer: The organizer has not set up matches yet.
bracket.benchHint: Drag here to remove a team from a match
bracket.losersBracketHint: Losers bracket will fill in automatically after matches are played.
bracket.draftIncomplete: Complete the draft before entering scores

seriesError.score_out_of_range: Each score must be between 0 and {winsNeeded}
